title: clidemia marginata
intro: Clidemia marginata, also known as the red inflorescence or mountain fire, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, Clidemia marginata has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clidemia marginata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various infections. Clidemia marginata can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
